miwi        2009-11-04 14:56:53 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/py-django-tagging Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  A generic tagging application for Django projects, which allows association of
  a number of tags with any Model instance and makes retrieval of tags simple.
  
  WWW:    http://code.google.com/p/django-tagging/
  
  PR:             ports/140110
  Submitted by:   Kevin Golding <ports at caomhin.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2460    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile

  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/py-django-tagging/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/www/py-django-tagging/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +53 -0     ports/www/py-django-tagging/pkg-plist (new)
